x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CMDB completeness is a top-level health indicator for AI data quality. Low completeness directly translates to generic rather than environment-specific AI insights from Now Assist.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable CMDB Health scheduled jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Target: 80%+ completeness. Low completeness translates directly to generic rather than environment-specific AI insights from Now Assist.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_36f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c14
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CMDB completeness is a top-level health indicator for AI data quality. Low completeness directly translates to generic rather than environment-specific AI insights from Now Assist.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Overall CMDB Completeness Score</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmdb_health_scorecard not found", finding: "CMDB Health Scorecard table is not available. Verify the CMDB Health plugin is active." };
    }
    var gr = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    gr.orderByDesc("sys_created_on");
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) {
        var score = parseFloat(gr.getValue("completeness_score") || 0);
        var actualValue = "CMDB Completeness Score: " + score + "% (from health dashboard)";
        if (score >= 80) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Completeness Score is " + score + "%. Now Assist has sufficient CI attribute data for accurate AI impact analysis and recommendations." };
        if (score >= 60) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Completeness Score is " + score + "% (target: 80%+). Incomplete CI data will cause Now Assist to produce generic rather than environment-specific AI insights." };
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Completeness Score is only " + score + "%. Severely incomplete CI data means Now Assist cannot produce reliable AI insights." };
    }
    var gaComplete = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_server");
    gaComplete.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaComplete.addQuery("name", "!=", "");
    gaComplete.addQuery("os_version", "!=", "");
    gaComplete.addQuery("ip_address", "!=", "");
    gaComplete.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaComplete.query();
    var complete = gaComplete.next() ? parseInt(gaComplete.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_server");
    gaTotal.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((complete / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = "Proxy score: " + pct + "% (" + complete + " of " + total + " server CIs with mandatory fields). Enable CMDB Health jobs for official score.";
    if (pct >= 80) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy completeness: " + pct + "% of server CIs have mandatory fields populated." };
    if (pct >= 60) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy completeness: only " + pct + "% of server CIs have mandatory fields (target: 80%+)." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy completeness: only " + pct + "% of server CIs have mandatory fields. Critical CMDB completeness gap." };
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000373</number><order>10</order><remediation_guidance>Enable CMDB Health scheduled jobs via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Activate Completeness, Correctness, and Compliance Score Calculation jobs. Target: 80%+ completeness. Low completeness translates directly to generic rather than environment-specific AI insights from Now Assist.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>36f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c14</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Overall CMDB Completeness Score</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_36f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c14</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
